channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: An emboldened anti-abortion faction wants women who have abortions to face criminal charges
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As Kristan Hawkins, president of the national anti-abortion group Students for Life, tours college campuses, she has grown accustomed to counterprotests from abortion rights activists.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINE FERNANDO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump administration ordered to unfreeze funding in dispute with Maine over transgender students
item.description: A U.S. District Court judge ordered the Trump administration to unfreeze federal aid to Maine to comply with requirements under a law aimed at prohibiting sex-based discrimination in education.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: ICE deports former Mexico governor serving federal prison sentence in Illinois
item.description: ICE turned over convicted criminal Tomas Jesus Yarrington Ruvalcaba, former governor of Tamaulipas, Mexico, to Mexican authorities at the San Ysidro Port of Entry.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utahns express concerns over potential impacts of 'SAVE Act' on women voters
item.description: A bill under consideration in Washington could change the way you register to vote, and critics believe it could disenfranchise women at the polls.
item.dc:creator: McKenzie Diaz, ABC 4

item.title: Deadly crash raises new questions about safety of New York’s helicopter tours
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A helicopter ride giving a thrilling sweep of Manhattan’s iconic skyline has long been on the to-do list for New York City tourists of means.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mideast mediator Oman at the center of a key first Iran-US meeting over Tehran's nuclear program
item.description: MUSCAT, Oman (AP) — Once again, some of the highest stakes in Middle East geopolitics will be discussed in this quiet coastal city without skyscrapers.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Strict Idaho abortion ban loosened by judge's ruling on medical exemptions
item.description: A judge has ruled than an abortion in Idaho is not prohibited if pregnancy complications could cause a woman's death.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump reaches deals with 5 law firms, allowing them to avoid prospect of punishing executive orders
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump announced deals Friday with five law firms that will allow them to avoid the prospect of punishing executive orders and require them to together provide hundreds of millions of dollars' worth of free legal services for causes his administration says it suppor
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: From classifying immigrants as dead to deportation: A guide to actions on Trump immigration policies
item.description: President Donald Trump's immigration agenda is playing out in numerous ways Friday, from hearings in key cases on the government's power to deport people to the start of a registry required for all those who are in the country illegally.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The Latest: Trump administration offers no details on mistakenly deported man after court ruling
item.description: A federal judge on Friday lambasted a government lawyer who couldn’t explain what, if anything, President Donald Trump’s administration has done to arrange for the return of a Maryland man who was mistakenly deported last month to a notorious prison in El Salvador. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Universal announces UK theme park amid 'epic' growth of parks business
item.description: Universal Destinations & Experiences is expanding its global theme park footprint, confirming a new theme park will be built in the U.K. -- the latest in a trio of ambitious projects for the company.
item.dc:creator: Scott Gustin, Fox 5

item.title: Justice Department tasked with enforcing Trump's transgender sports ban in Maine
item.description: PORTLAND, Maine (AP) — Maine officials said Friday the state will not comply with a ban on transgender athletes in high school sports in the wake of a Trump administration finding that the state violated antidiscrimination laws by allowing the students to participate. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Judge scolds DOJ for demanding delay in mistakenly deported man case
item.description: The federal judge who ordered the Trump administration to try to return Kilmar Abrego Garcia, the man mistakenly deported to El Salvador, scolded the Justice Department for demanding more time to update the court on next steps.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, WGN 9

item.title: Amateur golfer urinates in creek at Masters Tournament, gets round of applause
item.description: U.S. Amateur champion Jose Luis Ballester had to take a different kind of relief Thursday at the Masters, just not the kind found in the Rules of Golf.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Murder defendant Karen Read says she would've 'cheered' OJ Simpson verdict as she prepares for 2nd trial
item.description: Karen Read says she would've "cheered" the OJ Simpson verdict if it happened today, in a reversal from her original reaction to his double murder trial.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2 American women arrested at border for smuggling unaccompanied minors: CBP
item.description: Two U.S. citizens have been arrested for smuggling unaccompanied Mexican girls into the United States.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Family from Spain, pilot killed in NYC sightseeing helicopter crash
item.description: Photos posted on the helicopter company’s website showed the couple and their children smiling as they boarded just before the flight took off.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Euzarraga, WGN 9

item.title: Here's how to use Zelle now that app has changed
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — Zelle has announced a big change. Its standalone app will be used for only one thing: to educate consumers about scams and fraud. The person-to-person transfers that made Zelle popular are still available, but only if your bank belongs to the Zelle network.
item.dc:creator: Shannon Behnken, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Olivia Munn mocks Trump's tariffs during surprise 'Daily Show' appearance
item.description: "Trump knows exactly what he's doing. He put tariffs that destroyed the global economy, so then he took them off, and now it's only mostly destroyed," Munn said.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, NewsNation

item.title: New York bills would protect Tesla owners, target Tesla dominance
item.description: That measure follows nationwide reports of Tesla owners, dealerships, and charging stations being vandalized.
item.dc:creator: Johan Sheridan, NewsNation

item.title: Grand jury indicts man for threats against Augusta National employee
item.description: A Georgia grand jury has returned an indictment against a man for his role in making threats against an employee of the Augusta National Golf Club.
item.dc:creator: D.V. Wise, Fox 5

item.title: Annual White House Christmas ornament honors state dinner culinary diplomacy
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The art of culinary diplomacy, practiced by presidents at White House state dinners for more than 150 years, is the theme of this year's official White House Christmas ornament.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Helicopter crashes in New York City's Hudson River; 6 dead
item.description: A Bell 206 helicopter belonging to a tour company crashed in the water near Jersey City and Hoboken around 3:15 p.m., according to NYPD Commissioner Jessica Tisch.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, KRON4

item.title: Utah has nation's highest median household income when adjusted for cost of living, new report says
item.description: Utah has the highest median household income in the country when adjusted for differences in cost of living, according to a new study.
item.dc:creator: Aubree B. Jennings, ABC 4

item.title: Trump orders agencies to ‘sunset’ environmental protections
item.description: The order applies to all regulations issued under laws governing things like energy appliance standards, mining and offshore drilling — as well as regulations issued under the Endangered Species Act.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, KRON4

item.title: Trump threatens to put higher tariff rate back if countries don’t strike deals
item.description: President Trump on Thursday threatened to reverse course on a 90-day pause on country-specific tariffs if countries don’t strike a deal with his administration before then.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Hearing looks at rules for evidence and other details in Bryan Kohberger's quadruple murder trial
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Prosecutors and attorneys for a man charged in the killings of four University of Idaho students in 2022 argued some of the final ground rules they want for Bryan Kohberger's trial in a hearing Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA BOONE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump reverses Biden rule restricting water usage for showerheads and other home appliances
item.description: President Donald Trump has long complained about modern rules that limit water flow for showerheads, making it harder for him to wash his "beautiful hair.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Daly, WFLA, NBC

item.title: S&P 500 sinks 3.5% as Wall Street swings from euphoria back to worries about US-China trade war
item.description: The losses for U.S. stocks accelerated Thursday after the White House clarified that Chinese imports will be tariffed at 145%, not the 125% rate that Trump had written about in his posting on Truth Social Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: House Republicans pass bill requiring proof of citizenship to vote
item.description: House Republicans for a second time passed a stand-alone bill that would require proof of citizenship to vote in federal elections and impose voter roll purge requirements on states. The legislation — formally titled the Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act — passed in a 220-208 vote.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, WGN 9

item.title: House GOP adopts Trump budget blueprint after last-minute scramble
item.description: House Republicans on Thursday adopted the Senate’s framework that will be used to enact key parts of President Trump’s legislative agenda, getting the blueprint over the finish line after a last-minute scramble to win over conservatives who had spent days railing against the measure.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, WGN 9

item.title: St. George parents arrested after toddler found alone outside
item.description: Two parents in St. George were taken into custody on Wednesday after their 2-year-old son was found outside of the home unattended.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: UTA announces 'significant' changes to several bus services including new routes
item.description: The Utah Transit Authority said significant changes are coming to its services in Davis, Salt Lake, and Utah County.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Jury awards $1.68 billion to women who accused writer and director James Toback of sexual abuse
item.description: The judgement marks one of the largest jury awards since the advent of the #MeToo movement, as well as in New York state history
item.dc:creator: Susan Haigh, Fox 5

item.title: Author Jillian Lauren, wife of Weezer bassist, arrested after being shot by police
item.description: Jillian Lauren, author and wife of Weezer bassist Scott Shriner, was shot and injured by Los Angeles police and arrested on suspicion of attempted murder after pointing a gun at officers from her front yard, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ballerina Ksenia Karelina freed from Russian custody in prisoner exchange
item.description: Ksenia Karelina, a U.S.-Russian dual national who was detained last year on treason charges, was released from Russia in the latest prisoner exchange, according to the State Department.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KRON4

item.title: Trump tariffs, including massive levies on China, go into effect
item.description: President Donald Trump's latest round of sweeping reciprocal tariffs went into effect early Wednesday, including a 104 percent import tax on China.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5
